emails.subject: Eric Benke
emails.body: Eric Benke Eric after much negotiations has decided to go with his other offer. Tried my best. Sorry.

emails.subject: RE: Eric Benke
emails.body: RE: Eric Benke What other offer?

emails.subject: RE: Eric Benke
emails.body: RE: Eric Benke He wanted over 100k and be made a manager. So johny and kim were looking at a standard associate package. Before we completed anything for you to approve he took his other ofer and told us not to work on a offer. He left me a voice Mail that was rather shallow. Beats me! Lloyd Will
